title: An Act to Facilitate the Reconstruction of Storm-damaged Commercial Fisheries Facilities and Infrastructure
last_house_action: 6/9/2025 - This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 6/9/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED - Emergency - 2/3 Elected Required, in concurrence.

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on May 1, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on HOUSING AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2

Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-246) READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (S-246) . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-246) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED - Emergency - 2/3 Elected Required, in concurrence.
